events.name: Multi-Blind Real Man's Style (Using Only 1 Cube)

records.notes: 08.12.2023 / "Memo" ~ 1s or less, 1-look basically. Scr: R2 D L2 U R D R U R D L2 U R D2 L2 U2 R3 D3 L2 U R2 D L2 U R2 U (cstimer) / rec: (D L2 D R2 U L2 D R2 U3 L3 D2 R2 U first two rows) (U L2 D R3 U L3 last two rows) / very obvious scramble, 34 moves in total, many wide moves, so numbers don't change that much, very short ending, which helps a lot, finally got that after about 2 hours of attempts, maybe will do another on video later.
